_note: v19 source confirmed from ~/git/odoo19. Includes all subparser sub-actions (db/i18n/module) as compound command_name with space, non-subparser command flags, 7 server drift flags (PosixOnly), and tsconfig removed from commands[]. WI-A issue #336.

commands.name: server
commands.description: Start the Odoo server

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Scaffold a new Odoo module

commands.name: start
commands.description: Quick start with automatic database setup

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy a module to an Odoo instance

commands.name: shell
commands.description: Open an interactive Python shell with Odoo environment

commands.name: cloc
commands.description: Count lines of code for Odoo modules

commands.name: populate
commands.description: Populate database with fake data for testing

commands.name: genproxytoken
commands.description: Generate a proxy token for use with the proxy mode

commands.name: db
commands.description: Database management commands: init, load, dump, duplicate, rename, drop

commands.name: db init
commands.description: Create a new database

commands.name: db load
commands.description: Load a database dump into a new database

commands.name: db dump
commands.description: Dump a database to a file or stdout

commands.name: db duplicate
commands.description: Duplicate a database

commands.name: db rename
commands.description: Rename a database

commands.name: db drop
commands.description: Drop a database

commands.name: neutralize
commands.description: Neutralize a production database for development use

commands.name: obfuscate
commands.description: Obfuscate sensitive data in a database

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help for Odoo commands

commands.name: i18n
commands.description: Internationalization tools: import, export, loadlang

commands.name: i18n import
commands.description: Import translation files (.po, .csv) into a database

commands.name: i18n export
commands.description: Export module translations to i18n/ folder

commands.name: i18n loadlang
commands.description: Install languages into a database

commands.name: module
commands.description: Module management: install, upgrade, uninstall, force-demo

commands.name: module install
commands.description: Install one or more Odoo modules

commands.name: module upgrade
commands.description: Upgrade one or more Odoo modules

commands.name: module uninstall
commands.description: Uninstall one or more Odoo modules

commands.name: module force-demo
commands.description: Force installation of demo data for a module

commands.name: upgrade_code
commands.description: Automated code upgrade helper for Odoo migrations
